Le Mas · Beaucaire

Maison des Vendangeurs

Harvest spirit, under the plane trees.
5guests
2bedrooms
1pool
✓air conditioning
+ 1 photos

The Maison des Vendangeurs embodies the art of living at the Mas: stone walls, shaded terraces, vintage-find decor and careful details — lanterns, dried palms, antique mirrors.

With access to the estate’s pool and grounds, its terraces facing the countryside make it the ideal retreat for five guests seeking quiet and authenticity.

Amenities

Air conditioning
Equipped kitchen
Fibre Wifi
Queen-size bed
Shared pool (with Maison de Campagne)
Bikes available
Century-old trees
Private parking
Dishwasher
Smart TV
Filter coffee machine
Dolce Gusto coffee machine
Linen provided
Large garden
BBQ
